title: Agents
subtitle: Choose the right digital employee and let them help you get work done through conversation.
gatewayWarning: Gateway service is not running. Agent/channel changes may take a moment to apply.

agency.mineEmptyDescription: Add an Agent to create a digital employee of your own.
agency.systemDescription: OpenClaw main agent and uncategorized agents
agency.defaultDescription: OpenClaw's default agent for core conversations and task routing.

agencyIntro.message:
I'm {{name}} ({{agentId}}).
{{description}}

What I can do for you:
1. Identify what kind of task this is and clarify the goal, context, and constraints.
2. Apply {{category}} methods to analyze the issue, surface risks, and compare options.
3. Turn the findings into usable checklists, steps, copy, reports, or execution guidance.
4. Keep refining the plan as you add information and move the work toward a practical result.

Send me your request, materials, or question and I'll start.

agencyAgentIntros.accounts-payable-agent:
I'm Accounts Payable Agent (accounts-payable-agent).
Your autonomous payment operations specialist.

What I can do for you:
1. Process vendor invoices, contractor payments, and recurring bills.
2. Choose ACH, wire, crypto, or stablecoin rails based on amount, recipient, and cost.
3. Check duplicate payments, amount mismatches, and approval thresholds.
4. Track payment status and produce audit or spend summaries.

Send me the invoice, recipient details, or payment request and I'll start.
agencyAgentIntros.trend-researcher:
I'm Trend Researcher (trend-researcher).
Your product trend and market intelligence analyst.

What I can do for you:
1. Find trend signals from search, social, competitors, funding, and reports.
2. Analyze market size, user segments, and competitive landscape.
3. Judge opportunity strength, timing, and risks.
4. Turn findings into roadmap, priority, and validation recommendations.

Send me an industry, product direction, competitor, or audience and I'll start researching.

life.label: Life

agencyAgentDescriptions.ppt-generator: Turns ideas, materials, and goals into clear deck structures, slide titles, and speaker notes.
agencyAgentDescriptions.data-analyst: Turns tables and metrics into clear findings, chart ideas, and business recommendations.
agencyAgentDescriptions.stock-intelligence: Organizes stock signals, company news, and risks into research-ready intelligence briefs.
agencyAgentDescriptions.meeting-notes: Turns meeting notes into decisions, action items, owners, and follow-up messages.
agencyAgentDescriptions.daily-briefing: Condenses news, tasks, and priorities into a clear daily briefing.
agencyAgentDescriptions.content-summarizer: Distills long documents, articles, and media into takeaways, frameworks, and reusable notes.
agencyAgentDescriptions.email-secretary: Drafts replies, summarizes email threads, and turns messages into next actions.
agencyAgentDescriptions.life-companion: Helps you think through daily choices, habits, plans, and small unresolved decisions.
agencyAgentDescriptions.wardrobe-advisor: Builds practical outfit ideas from your occasion, weather, wardrobe, and style preferences.
agencyAgentDescriptions.career-analyst: Analyzes resumes, roles, interview strategy, and key career tradeoffs.
agencyAgentDescriptions.travel-planner: Plans realistic trips from your dates, budget, destination, and travel style.
agencyAgentDescriptions.pet-care-manager: Organizes pet feeding, care, supplies, behavior notes, and vet questions.
agencyAgentDescriptions.family-calendar-manager: Coordinates family schedules, chores, reminders, appointments, and recurring routines.

createDialog.title: Create Digital Employee
createDialog.description: Create a digital employee and define its responsibilities, strategy, and output style.
createDialog.shortDescriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the core capability. Example: creates marketing copy and brand content for ad concepts, product launches, and campaign promotion.
createDialog.instructionsPlaceholder:
Describe how this digital employee should work, including role, responsibilities, process, output style, and rules. Example:
## Role
- You are a senior copy strategist who turns user goals into persuasive, conversion-focused marketing copy.
## Responsibilities
- Analyze the target audience and communication goal, extract key selling points, and write high-quality copy across scenarios.
## Rules
- Verify factual claims before using them.
## Style
- Keep language concise, persuasive, and free of empty hype.

deleteDialog.title: Delete Agent
deleteDialog.message: Delete "{{name}}" from ClawX? This permanently deletes the agent and its ClawX-managed workspace, runtime, and session files from disk.

settingsDialog.title: {{name}} Settings
settingsDialog.description: Update the agent name and manage which channels belong to this agent.
settingsDialog.modelProviderEmpty: No provider accounts configured. Add one in Settings → AI Providers.
settingsDialog.modelOverrideDescription: Select provider and model ID for this agent.
settingsDialog.unsavedChangesMessage: You have unsaved changes. If you close now, your changes will be discarded.
settingsDialog.channelsDescription: This list is read-only. Manage channel accounts and bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.channelsManagedInChannels: This agent is linked to channel types. Manage exact account bindings in the Channels page.
settingsDialog.noChannels: No channels are assigned to this agent yet.

removeChannelDialog.title: Remove Channel
removeChannelDialog.message: Remove {{name}} from ClawX? This deletes the current channel configuration.

toast.agentModelInvalid: Model must be in provider/model format
